title: rubus weihei
intro: Rubus weihei, also known as the Chinese raspberry or Chinese bramble, is a species of raspberry native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Rubus weihei is typically prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a fresh fruit or dried in herbal preparations.
